card.name: Paras
card.flavorText: The mushrooms, known as tochukaso, are controlling the bug. Even if the bug bugs the mushrooms, they tell it to bug off.

card.name: Rowlet

abilities.name: Sky Circus
abilities.text: If you played Bird Keeper from your hand during this turn, ignore all Energy in this Pokémon's attack costs.

attacks.name: Wind Shard
attacks.text: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

card.flavorText: At a distance, it launches its sharp feathers while flying about. If the enemy gets too close, Rowlet switches tactics and delivers vicious kicks.

card.name: Mamoswine

attacks.name: Wreck
attacks.text: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 120 more damage. Then, discard that Stadium.

attacks.name: Blizzard Edge
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

card.flavorText: A frozen Mamoswine was dug from ice dating back 10,000 years. This Pokémon has been around a long, long, long time.

card.name: Mamoswine ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Mammoth Hauler
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Rumbling March
attacks.text: This attack does 40 more damage for each Stage 2 Pokémon on your Bench.

card.name: Mamoswine ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Mammoth Hauler
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Rumbling March
attacks.text: This attack does 40 more damage for each Stage 2 Pokémon on your Bench.

card.name: Mega Pyroar ex
rules: Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Ferocious Bellow
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do 50 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Fiery Big Bang
attacks.text: This attack does 10 less damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

card.name: Mega Zygarde ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Gaia Wave
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Nullifying Zero
attacks.text: For each of your opponent's Pokémon, flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 150 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

card.name: Mega Venusaur ex
rules: Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Solar Transfer
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may use this Ability. Move a Basic Grass Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Jungle Dump
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

card.name: Hisuian Typhlosion VSTAR
rules: VSTAR rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Hollow Flame
attacks.text: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Shimmering Star
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has exactly 4 damage counters on it, that Pokémon is Knocked Out. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

card.name: Gardevoir

abilities.name: Refinement
abilities.text: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw 2 cards.

card.flavorText: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its Trainer.

card.name: Gardevoir

abilities.name: Bright Heal
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Telekinesis
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

card.flavorText: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its Trainer.

card.name: Gardevoir

abilities.name: Refinement
abilities.text: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw 2 cards.

card.flavorText: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its Trainer.

card.name: Umbreon & Darkrai-GX
rules: TAG TEAM rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Black Lance
attacks.text: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon-GX or Benched Pokémon-EX. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Dark Moon-GX
attacks.text: Your opponent can't play any Trainer cards from their hand during their next turn. If this Pokémon has at least 5 extra Darkness Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

attacks.name: Obliterating Nose
attacks.text: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.

card.name: Rapid Strike Urshifu VMAX
rules: VMAX rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Gale Thrust
attacks.text: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 120 more damage.

attacks.name: G-Max Rapid Flow
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

card.name: Venusaur

abilities.name: Jungle Totem
abilities.text: Each basic Grass Energy attached to your Pokémon provides GrassGrass Energy. You can't apply more than 1 Jungle Totem Ability at a time.

card.flavorText: By spreading the broad petals of its flower and catching the sun's rays, it fills its body with power.

card.name: Hisuian Typhlosion VSTAR
rules: VSTAR rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Hollow Flame
attacks.text: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Shimmering Star
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has exactly 4 damage counters on it, that Pokémon is Knocked Out. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

abilities.name: Refinement
abilities.text: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw 2 cards.

card.flavorText: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its Trainer.

card.name: Torkoal V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Combustion Pillar
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your deck. If that card is a Fire Energy card, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Steam Crush
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

card.name: Orthworm ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Pummeling Payback
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put 2 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rock Tomb
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

card.name: Weavile

attacks.name: Hail Claw
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

card.flavorText: They travel in groups of four or five, leaving signs for one another on trees and rocks. They bring down their prey with coordinated attacks.

abilities.name: Stone Arms
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Attach a Basic Fighting Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Fighting Pokémon.

card.name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Iron Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

card.flavorText: A plan was recently announced to gather many Pikachu and make an electric power plant.
